description:
Data Engineer (Remote)
Location & Work Arrangement
- Remote / Work from home position
- Must be based in Klang Valley to attend one team meeting per week
Why You Should Apply
- Join a data-first, AI-enabled, fast-growing Malaysian tech company with recent funding
- Access to all the tools, support, and training needed to succeed
- Be part of a strong data team including senior data engineers, business intelligence professionals, and data scientists to learn from
- Work for an award-winning company recognized as one of the “Best Places to Work,” with low staff turnover and high chances of internal promotions
- Excellent opportunity to learn, grow, and progress your career in a positive company culture
Key Responsibilities
- Build and maintain a data lake solution, including developing pipelines into the lake
- Revamp and optimize the data warehouse
- Design data pipelines and optimize databases and AWS Cloud infrastructure to support BI and data science teams in building crucial decision support tools
- Build prototypes and models, and validate solutions with stakeholders
Requirements
- Minimum 2 years of experience in Python and SQL
- Experience building data pipelines within an AWS environment
- Familiarity with BI tools such as Power BI, Metabase, and Google Analytics
About the Company & Team
- Malaysian tech-first product company established for 10 years and experiencing rapid growth
- Led by a leadership team, including a CEO with IPO experience
- Provides a suite of Health-Tech products to enterprise customers across Southeast Asia
- Operates on a SaaS business model with strong customer retention, growth, and recent new funding
How to Apply
- Click the “apply” button to submit your application
- You may submit an updated CV or simply share your LinkedIn profile—just send what you have
- The recruiter is happy to provide more information before you proceed
- Every applicant or enquiry will receive a reply
Additional Notes
- The company cannot provide employment passes, work visas, or relocation assistance
- Only applicants with work rights in Malaysia will be considered
